structured.title: Discuss Lyrics Timing And Video Loading
structured.overview: The participants discussed how the lyrics and timing work, noting that the lyrics are almost but not quite on time, with the reverse timing being the biggest advantage because it makes the flow easier to follow. They also observed that the system can show a whole verse at once so users can see ahead, though it is not perfect. The conversation briefly shifted to video loading, with one participant saying it is hard to find small videos that are already loaded or doubly loaded.

transcript_segments.text: Ja, Skijvonia. The lyrics. They're almost not quite on time, but they do reverse at a time, and it's very easy to pick up. So I do think it matters quite as much.

apps_results.content:
## Timing and lyrics
- Lyrics are slightly off-beat
- Reverse timing is easy to follow
- Timing still matters a lot

## Biggest advantage
- Reverse timing is the main win
- Whole verse plays at once
- Lets you see ahead

## Quality concerns
- Not perfect overall
- Not awful either
- Hard to find loaded videos

## Next steps
- No clear next steps mentioned
